meaning: n.奇迹,惊奇,惊愕vt.对...感到惊讶,惊奇,想知道vi.惊讶,怀疑adj.非凡的,奇妙的
examples: I wonder if you can help me.
I wonder who that letter was from.
Is it any wonder the markets have become so much more volatile in recent years?
Ever wonder how credit reporting companies like Equifax dig up dirt on overextended consumers?
